{{Navbox | name = Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōnen | title = [[Shogakukan Manga Award]] – [[Shōnen manga|Shōnen]] | state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} | listclass = hlist
| group1 = 1970s | list1 = *''[[The Poe Clan]]'' and ''[[They Were Eleven]]'' by [[Moto Hagio]] (1975) *''[[Captain (manga)|Captain]]'' and ''[[Play Ball (manga)|Play Ball]]'' by [[Akio Chiba]] and ''[[Ganbare Genki]]'' by [[Yū Koyama]] (1976) *''[[Galaxy Express 999]]'' and ''[[The Cockpit (OVA)|Senjo Manga series]]'' by [[Leiji Matsumoto]] (1977) *''[[Dame Oyaji]]'' by [[Mitsutoshi Furuya]] (1978) *''[[Toward the Terra]]'' and ''[[Kaze to Ki no Uta]]'' by [[Keiko Takemiya]] (1979)
| group2 = 1980s | list2 = *''[[Urusei Yatsura]]'' by [[Rumiko Takahashi]] (1980) *''[[Dr. Slump]]'' by [[Akira Toriyama]] (1981) *''[[Miyuki (manga)|Miyuki]]'' and ''[[Touch (manga)|Touch]]'' by [[Mitsuru Adachi]] (1982) *''[[Musashi no Ken]]'' by [[Motoka Murakami]] (1983) *''[[Futari Daka]]'' and ''[[Area 88]]'' by [[Kaoru Shintani]] (1984) *''[[Hatsukoi Scandal]]'' and ''[[Tobe! Jinrui II]]'' by [[Akira Oze]] (1985) *''[[Silver Fang]]'' by [[Yoshihiro Takahashi]] (1986) *''[[Just Meet]]'' and ''[[Fuyu Monogatari]]'' by [[Hidenori Hara]] (1987) *''[[B.B. (manga)|B.B.]]'' by [[Osamu Ishiwata]] (1988) *''[[Ucchare Goshogawara]]'' by [[Tsuyoshi Nakaima]] (1989)
| group3 = 1990s | list3 = *''[[Patlabor|Mobile Police Patlabor]]'' by [[Masami Yuki]] (1990) *''[[Ushio & Tora]]'' by [[Kazuhiro Fujita]] (1991) *''[[Ghost Sweeper Mikami]]'' by [[Takashi Shiina]] and ''[[Yaiba]]'' by [[Gosho Aoyama]] (1992) *''[[YuYu Hakusho]]'' by [[Yoshihiro Togashi]] (1993) *''[[Slam Dunk (manga)|Slam Dunk]]'' by [[Takehiko Inoue]] (1994) *''[[Major (manga)|Major]]'' by [[Takuya Mitsuda]] (1995) *''[[Firefighter! Daigo of Fire Company M]]'' by [[Masahito Soda]] (1996) *''[[Ganba! Fly High]]'' by [[Shinji Morisue]] and [[Hiroyuki Kikuta]] (1997) *''[[Project ARMS]]'' by [[Kyoichi Nanatsuki]] and [[Ryōji Minagawa]] (1998) *''[[Monkey Turn]]'' by [[Katsutoshi Kawai]] and ''[[Hikaru no Go]]'' by [[Yumi Hotta]] and [[Takeshi Obata]] (1999)
| group4 = 2000s | list4 = *''[[Case Closed]]'' by [[Gosho Aoyama]] and ''[[Cheeky Angel]]'' by [[Hiroyuki Nishimori]] (2000) *''[[Inuyasha]]'' by [[Rumiko Takahashi]] (2001) *''[[Zatch Bell!]]'' by [[Makoto Raiku]] (2002) *''[[Yakitate!! Japan]]'' by [[Takashi Hashiguchi]] and ''[[Fullmetal Alchemist]]'' by [[Hiromu Arakawa]] (2003) *''[[Bleach (manga)|Bleach]]'' by [[Tite Kubo]] (2004) *''[[Wild Life (manga)|Wild Life]]'' by [[Masato Fujisaki]] (2005) *''[[Kekkaishi]]'' by [[Yellow Tanabe]] (2006) *''[[Ace of Diamond]]'' by [[Yuji Terajima]] (2007) *''[[Cross Game]]'' by [[Mitsuru Adachi]] (2008) *''[[Sket Dance]]'' by [[Kenta Shinohara]] (2009)
| group5 = 2010s | list5 = *''[[King Golf]]'' by [[Ken Sasaki]] (2010) *''[[Nobunaga Concerto]]'' by [[Ayumi Ishii]] (2011) *''[[Silver Spoon (manga)|Silver Spoon]]'' by [[Hiromu Arakawa]] (2012) *''[[Magi: The Labyrinth of Magic]]'' by [[Shinobu Ohtaka]] (2013) *''[[Be Blues!|Be Blues! - Ao ni Nare]]'' by [[Motoyuki Tanaka]] (2014) *''[[Haikyu!!]]'' by [[Haruichi Furudate]] (2015) *''[[Mob Psycho 100]]'' by [[One (manga artist)|One]] (2016) *''[[The Promised Neverland]]'' by [[Kaiu Shirai]] and [[Posuka Demizu]] (2017) *''[[Dr. Stone]]'' by [[Riichiro Inagaki]] and [[Boichi]] (2018) *''[[Kiyo in Kyoto|Maiko-san chi no Makanai-san]]'' by Aiko Koyama (2019)
| group6 = 2020s | list6 = *''[[Teasing Master Takagi-san]]'' by [[Sōichirō Yamamoto]] and ''[[Chainsaw Man]]'' by [[Tatsuki Fujimoto]] (2020) *''[[Komi Can't Communicate]]'' by Tomohito Oda (2021) *''[[Call of the Night]]'' by Kotoyama and ''[[Ao no Orchestra]]'' by Makoto Akui (2022)
| below = {{hlist|Categories (until 2022):|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - General|General]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōnen|Shōnen]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōjo|Shōjo]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Children|Children]]}}{{hlist|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award|2023–]]}} }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Shogakukan Manga Award navigational boxes| ]] </noinclude>

| group1 = 1970s | list1 = *''[[The Poe Clan]]'' and ''[[They Were Eleven]]'' by [[Moto Hagio]] (1975) *''[[:en:Captain (manga)|Captain]]'' and ''[[Play Ball (manga)|Play Ball]]'' by [[:en:Akio Chiba|Akio Chiba]] and ''[[Ganbare Genki]]'' by [[Yū Koyama]] (1976) *''[[:en:Galaxy Express 999|Galaxy Express 999]]'' and ''[[The Cockpit (OVA)|Senjo Manga series]]'' by [[Leiji Matsumoto]] (1977) *''[[:en:Dame Oyaji|Dame Oyaji]]'' by [[Mitsutoshi Furuya]] (1978) *''[[Toward the Terra]]'' and ''[[Kaze to Ki no Uta]]'' by [[Keiko Takemiya]] (1979)
| group2 = 1980s | list2 = *''[[Urusei Yatsura]]'' by [[Rumiko Takahashi]] (1980) *''[[Dr. Slump]]'' by [[:en:Akira Toriyama|Akira Toriyama]] (1981) *''[[Miyuki (manga)|Miyuki]]'' and ''[[Touch (manga)|Touch]]'' by [[Mitsuru Adachi]] (1982) *''[[Musashi no Ken]]'' by [[Motoka Murakami]] (1983) *''[[Futari Daka]]'' and ''[[:en:Area 88|Area 88]]'' by [[Kaoru Shintani]] (1984) *''[[Hatsukoi Scandal]]'' and ''[[Tobe! Jinrui II]]'' by [[:en:Akira Oze|Akira Oze]] (1985) *''[[Silver Fang]]'' by [[Yoshihiro Takahashi]] (1986) *''[[Just Meet]]'' and ''[[Fuyu Monogatari]]'' by [[Hidenori Hara]] (1987) *''[[:en:B.B. (manga)|B.B.]]'' by [[Osamu Ishiwata]] (1988) *''[[Ucchare Goshogawara]]'' by [[Tsuyoshi Nakaima]] (1989)
| group3 = 1990s | list3 = *''[[Patlabor|Mobile Police Patlabor]]'' by [[Masami Yuki]] (1990) *''[[Ushio & Tora]]'' by [[Kazuhiro Fujita]] (1991) *''[[Ghost Sweeper Mikami]]'' by [[Takashi Shiina]] and ''[[Yaiba]]'' by [[Gosho Aoyama]] (1992) *''[[YuYu Hakusho]]'' by [[Yoshihiro Togashi]] (1993) *''[[Slam Dunk (manga)|Slam Dunk]]'' by [[Takehiko Inoue]] (1994) *''[[Major (manga)|Major]]'' by [[Takuya Mitsuda]] (1995) *''[[:en:Firefighter! Daigo of Fire Company M|Firefighter! Daigo of Fire Company M]]'' by [[Masahito Soda]] (1996) *''[[Ganba! Fly High]]'' by [[Shinji Morisue]] and [[Hiroyuki Kikuta]] (1997) *''[[Project ARMS]]'' by [[Kyoichi Nanatsuki]] and [[Ryōji Minagawa]] (1998) *''[[Monkey Turn]]'' by [[Katsutoshi Kawai]] and ''[[Hikaru no Go]]'' by [[Yumi Hotta]] and [[Takeshi Obata]] (1999)
| group4 = 2000s | list4 = *''[[:en:Case Closed|Case Closed]]'' by [[Gosho Aoyama]] and ''[[Cheeky Angel]]'' by [[Hiroyuki Nishimori]] (2000) *''[[Inuyasha]]'' by [[Rumiko Takahashi]] (2001) *''[[Zatch Bell!]]'' by [[Makoto Raiku]] (2002) *''[[Yakitate!! Japan]]'' by [[Takashi Hashiguchi]] and ''[[Fullmetal Alchemist]]'' by [[Hiromu Arakawa]] (2003) *''[[Bleach (manga)|Bleach]]'' by [[Tite Kubo]] (2004) *''[[Wild Life (manga)|Wild Life]]'' by [[Masato Fujisaki]] (2005) *''[[Kekkaishi]]'' by [[Yellow Tanabe]] (2006) *''[[:en:Ace of Diamond|Ace of Diamond]]'' by [[Yuji Terajima]] (2007) *''[[Cross Game]]'' by [[Mitsuru Adachi]] (2008) *''[[Sket Dance]]'' by [[Kenta Shinohara]] (2009)
| group5 = 2010s | list5 = *''[[King Golf]]'' by [[Ken Sasaki]] (2010) *''[[Nobunaga Concerto]]'' by [[Ayumi Ishii]] (2011) *''[[Silver Spoon (manga)|Silver Spoon]]'' by [[Hiromu Arakawa]] (2012) *''[[Magi: The Labyrinth of Magic]]'' by [[Shinobu Ohtaka]] (2013) *''[[Be Blues!|Be Blues! - Ao ni Nare]]'' by [[Motoyuki Tanaka]] (2014) *''[[Haikyu!!]]'' by [[Haruichi Furudate]] (2015) *''[[Mob Psycho 100]]'' by [[One (manga artist)|One]] (2016) *''[[The Promised Neverland]]'' by [[Kaiu Shirai]] and [[Posuka Demizu]] (2017) *''[[Dr. Stone]]'' by [[Riichiro Inagaki]] and [[Boichi]] (2018) *''[[Kiyo in Kyoto|Maiko-san chi no Makanai-san]]'' by Aiko Koyama (2019)
| group6 = 2020s | list6 = *''[[Teasing Master Takagi-san]]'' by [[Sōichirō Yamamoto]] and ''[[Chainsaw Man]]'' by [[Tatsuki Fujimoto]] (2020) *''[[Komi Can't Communicate]]'' by Tomohito Oda (2021) *''[[:en:Call of the Night|Call of the Night]]'' by Kotoyama and ''[[:en:Ao no Orchestra|Ao no Orchestra]]'' by Makoto Akui (2022)
| below = {{hlist|Categories (until 2022):|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - General|General]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōnen|Shōnen]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōjo|Shōjo]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Children|Children]]}}{{hlist|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award|2023–]]}} }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Shogakukan Manga Award navigational boxes| ]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōnen | title = [[Shogakukan Manga Award]] – [[Shōnen manga|Shōnen]] | state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} | listclass = hlist
| group1 = 1970s | list1 = *''[[The Poe Clan]]'' and ''[[They Were Eleven]]'' by [[Moto Hagio]] (1975) *''[[:en:Captain (manga)|Captain]]'' and ''[[Play Ball (manga)|Play Ball]]'' by [[:en:Akio Chiba|Akio Chiba]] and ''[[:en:Ganbare Genki|Ganbare Genki]]'' by [[Yū Koyama]] (1976) *''[[:en:Galaxy Express 999|Galaxy Express 999]]'' and ''[[The Cockpit (OVA)|Senjo Manga series]]'' by [[Leiji Matsumoto]] (1977) *''[[:en:Dame Oyaji|Dame Oyaji]]'' by [[Mitsutoshi Furuya]] (1978) *''[[Toward the Terra]]'' and ''[[Kaze to Ki no Uta]]'' by [[Keiko Takemiya]] (1979)
| group2 = 1980s | list2 = *''[[Urusei Yatsura]]'' by [[Rumiko Takahashi]] (1980) *''[[:en:Dr. Slump|Dr. Slump]]'' by [[:en:Akira Toriyama|Akira Toriyama]] (1981) *''[[Miyuki (manga)|Miyuki]]'' and ''[[Touch (manga)|Touch]]'' by [[Mitsuru Adachi]] (1982) *''[[Musashi no Ken]]'' by [[Motoka Murakami]] (1983) *''[[Futari Daka]]'' and ''[[:en:Area 88|Area 88]]'' by [[Kaoru Shintani]] (1984) *''[[Hatsukoi Scandal]]'' and ''[[Tobe! Jinrui II]]'' by [[:en:Akira Oze|Akira Oze]] (1985) *''[[Silver Fang]]'' by [[Yoshihiro Takahashi]] (1986) *''[[Just Meet]]'' and ''[[Fuyu Monogatari]]'' by [[Hidenori Hara]] (1987) *''[[:en:B.B. (manga)|B.B.]]'' by [[Osamu Ishiwata]] (1988) *''[[Ucchare Goshogawara]]'' by [[Tsuyoshi Nakaima]] (1989)
| group3 = 1990s | list3 = *''[[Patlabor|Mobile Police Patlabor]]'' by [[Masami Yuki]] (1990) *''[[Ushio & Tora]]'' by [[Kazuhiro Fujita]] (1991) *''[[Ghost Sweeper Mikami]]'' by [[Takashi Shiina]] and ''[[Yaiba]]'' by [[Gosho Aoyama]] (1992) *''[[YuYu Hakusho]]'' by [[Yoshihiro Togashi]] (1993) *''[[Slam Dunk (manga)|Slam Dunk]]'' by [[Takehiko Inoue]] (1994) *''[[Major (manga)|Major]]'' by [[Takuya Mitsuda]] (1995) *''[[:en:Firefighter! Daigo of Fire Company M|Firefighter! Daigo of Fire Company M]]'' by [[Masahito Soda]] (1996) *''[[:en:Ganba! Fly High|Ganba! Fly High]]'' by [[Shinji Morisue]] and [[Hiroyuki Kikuta]] (1997) *''[[Project ARMS]]'' by [[Kyoichi Nanatsuki]] and [[Ryōji Minagawa]] (1998) *''[[Monkey Turn]]'' by [[Katsutoshi Kawai]] and ''[[Hikaru no Go]]'' by [[Yumi Hotta]] and [[Takeshi Obata]] (1999)
| group4 = 2000s | list4 = *''[[:en:Case Closed|Case Closed]]'' by [[Gosho Aoyama]] and ''[[:en:Cheeky Angel|Cheeky Angel]]'' by [[Hiroyuki Nishimori]] (2000) *''[[Inuyasha]]'' by [[Rumiko Takahashi]] (2001) *''[[Zatch Bell!]]'' by [[Makoto Raiku]] (2002) *''[[Yakitate!! Japan]]'' by [[Takashi Hashiguchi]] and ''[[Fullmetal Alchemist]]'' by [[Hiromu Arakawa]] (2003) *''[[:en:Bleach (manga)|Bleach]]'' by [[Tite Kubo]] (2004) *''[[Wild Life (manga)|Wild Life]]'' by [[Masato Fujisaki]] (2005) *''[[Kekkaishi]]'' by [[Yellow Tanabe]] (2006) *''[[:en:Ace of Diamond|Ace of Diamond]]'' by [[Yuji Terajima]] (2007) *''[[Cross Game]]'' by [[Mitsuru Adachi]] (2008) *''[[Sket Dance]]'' by [[Kenta Shinohara]] (2009)
| group5 = 2010s | list5 = *''[[King Golf]]'' by [[Ken Sasaki]] (2010) *''[[Nobunaga Concerto]]'' by [[Ayumi Ishii]] (2011) *''[[Silver Spoon (manga)|Silver Spoon]]'' by [[Hiromu Arakawa]] (2012) *''[[Magi: The Labyrinth of Magic]]'' by [[Shinobu Ohtaka]] (2013) *''[[:en:Be Blues!|Be Blues! - Ao ni Nare]]'' by [[Motoyuki Tanaka]] (2014) *''[[Haikyu!!]]'' by [[Haruichi Furudate]] (2015) *''[[Mob Psycho 100]]'' by [[One (manga artist)|One]] (2016) *''[[The Promised Neverland]]'' by [[Kaiu Shirai]] and [[Posuka Demizu]] (2017) *''[[:en:Dr. Stone|Dr. Stone]]'' by [[Riichiro Inagaki]] and [[:en:Boichi|Boichi]] (2018) *''[[Kiyo in Kyoto|Maiko-san chi no Makanai-san]]'' by Aiko Koyama (2019)
| group6 = 2020s | list6 = *''[[Teasing Master Takagi-san]]'' by [[Sōichirō Yamamoto]] and ''[[:en:Chainsaw Man|Chainsaw Man]]'' by [[Tatsuki Fujimoto]] (2020) *''[[Komi Can't Communicate]]'' by Tomohito Oda (2021) *''[[:en:Call of the Night|Call of the Night]]'' by Kotoyama and ''[[:en:Ao no Orchestra|Ao no Orchestra]]'' by Makoto Akui (2022)
| below = {{hlist|Categories (until 2022):|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - General|General]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōnen|Shōnen]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōjo|Shōjo]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Children|Children]]}}{{hlist|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award|2023–]]}} }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Shogakukan Manga Award navigational boxes| ]] </noinclude>

| group1 = 1970s | list1 = *''[[The Poe Clan]]'' and ''[[They Were Eleven]]'' by [[:en:Moto Hagio|Moto Hagio]] (1975) *''[[:en:Captain (manga)|Captain]]'' and ''[[:en:Play Ball (manga)|Play Ball]]'' by [[:en:Akio Chiba|Akio Chiba]] and ''[[:en:Ganbare Genki|Ganbare Genki]]'' by [[Yū Koyama]] (1976) *''[[:en:Galaxy Express 999|Galaxy Express 999]]'' and ''[[The Cockpit (OVA)|Senjo Manga series]]'' by [[:en:Leiji Matsumoto|Leiji Matsumoto]] (1977) *''[[:en:Dame Oyaji|Dame Oyaji]]'' by [[:en:Mitsutoshi Furuya|Mitsutoshi Furuya]] (1978) *''[[Toward the Terra]]'' and ''[[:en:Kaze to Ki no Uta|Kaze to Ki no Uta]]'' by [[:en:Keiko Takemiya|Keiko Takemiya]] (1979)
| group2 = 1980s | list2 = *''[[:en:Urusei Yatsura|Urusei Yatsura]]'' by [[Rumiko Takahashi]] (1980) *''[[:en:Dr. Slump|Dr. Slump]]'' by [[:en:Akira Toriyama|Akira Toriyama]] (1981) *''[[:en:Miyuki (manga)|Miyuki]]'' and ''[[Touch (manga)|Touch]]'' by [[:en:Mitsuru Adachi|Mitsuru Adachi]] (1982) *''[[:en:Musashi no Ken|Musashi no Ken]]'' by [[:en:Motoka Murakami|Motoka Murakami]] (1983) *''[[:en:Futari Daka|Futari Daka]]'' and ''[[:en:Area 88|Area 88]]'' by [[:en:Kaoru Shintani|Kaoru Shintani]] (1984) *''[[:en:Hatsukoi Scandal|Hatsukoi Scandal]]'' and ''[[Tobe! Jinrui II]]'' by [[:en:Akira Oze|Akira Oze]] (1985) *''[[Silver Fang]]'' by [[Yoshihiro Takahashi]] (1986) *''[[Just Meet]]'' and ''[[Fuyu Monogatari]]'' by [[:en:Hidenori Hara|Hidenori Hara]] (1987) *''[[:en:B.B. (manga)|B.B.]]'' by [[:en:Osamu Ishiwata|Osamu Ishiwata]] (1988) *''[[Ucchare Goshogawara]]'' by [[Tsuyoshi Nakaima]] (1989)
| group3 = 1990s | list3 = *''[[:en:Patlabor|Mobile Police Patlabor]]'' by [[:en:Masami Yuki|Masami Yuki]] (1990) *''[[Ushio & Tora]]'' by [[:en:Kazuhiro Fujita|Kazuhiro Fujita]] (1991) *''[[:en:Ghost Sweeper Mikami|Ghost Sweeper Mikami]]'' by [[:en:Takashi Shiina|Takashi Shiina]] and ''[[:en:Yaiba|Yaiba]]'' by [[:en:Gosho Aoyama|Gosho Aoyama]] (1992) *''[[YuYu Hakusho]]'' by [[Yoshihiro Togashi]] (1993) *''[[Slam Dunk (manga)|Slam Dunk]]'' by [[:en:Takehiko Inoue|Takehiko Inoue]] (1994) *''[[:en:Major (manga)|Major]]'' by [[:en:Takuya Mitsuda|Takuya Mitsuda]] (1995) *''[[:en:Firefighter! Daigo of Fire Company M|Firefighter! Daigo of Fire Company M]]'' by [[:en:Masahito Soda|Masahito Soda]] (1996) *''[[:en:Ganba! Fly High|Ganba! Fly High]]'' by [[Shinji Morisue]] and [[Hiroyuki Kikuta]] (1997) *''[[:en:Project ARMS|Project ARMS]]'' by [[Kyoichi Nanatsuki]] and [[Ryōji Minagawa]] (1998) *''[[:en:Monkey Turn|Monkey Turn]]'' by [[Katsutoshi Kawai]] and ''[[:en:Hikaru no Go|Hikaru no Go]]'' by [[Yumi Hotta]] and [[:en:Takeshi Obata|Takeshi Obata]] (1999)
| group4 = 2000s | list4 = *''[[:en:Case Closed|Case Closed]]'' by [[:en:Gosho Aoyama|Gosho Aoyama]] and ''[[:en:Cheeky Angel|Cheeky Angel]]'' by [[:en:Hiroyuki Nishimori|Hiroyuki Nishimori]] (2000) *''[[:en:Inuyasha|Inuyasha]]'' by [[Rumiko Takahashi]] (2001) *''[[:en:Zatch Bell!|Zatch Bell!]]'' by [[:en:Makoto Raiku|Makoto Raiku]] (2002) *''[[:en:Yakitate!! Japan|Yakitate!! Japan]]'' by [[:en:Takashi Hashiguchi|Takashi Hashiguchi]] and ''[[:en:Fullmetal Alchemist|Fullmetal Alchemist]]'' by [[:en:Hiromu Arakawa|Hiromu Arakawa]] (2003) *''[[:en:Bleach (manga)|Bleach]]'' by [[Tite Kubo]] (2004) *''[[Wild Life (manga)|Wild Life]]'' by [[Masato Fujisaki]] (2005) *''[[:en:Kekkaishi|Kekkaishi]]'' by [[Yellow Tanabe]] (2006) *''[[:en:Ace of Diamond|Ace of Diamond]]'' by [[Yuji Terajima]] (2007) *''[[:en:Cross Game|Cross Game]]'' by [[:en:Mitsuru Adachi|Mitsuru Adachi]] (2008) *''[[Sket Dance]]'' by [[:en:Kenta Shinohara|Kenta Shinohara]] (2009)
| group5 = 2010s | list5 = *''[[:en:King Golf|King Golf]]'' by [[Ken Sasaki]] (2010) *''[[:en:Nobunaga Concerto|Nobunaga Concerto]]'' by [[Ayumi Ishii]] (2011) *''[[Silver Spoon (manga)|Silver Spoon]]'' by [[:en:Hiromu Arakawa|Hiromu Arakawa]] (2012) *''[[:en:Magi: The Labyrinth of Magic|Magi: The Labyrinth of Magic]]'' by [[Shinobu Ohtaka]] (2013) *''[[:en:Be Blues!|Be Blues! - Ao ni Nare]]'' by [[Motoyuki Tanaka]] (2014) *''[[:en:Haikyu!!|Haikyu!!]]'' by [[:en:Haruichi Furudate|Haruichi Furudate]] (2015) *''[[:en:Mob Psycho 100|Mob Psycho 100]]'' by [[:en:One (manga artist)|One]] (2016) *''[[The Promised Neverland]]'' by [[:en:Kaiu Shirai|Kaiu Shirai]] and [[:en:Posuka Demizu|Posuka Demizu]] (2017) *''[[:en:Dr. Stone|Dr. Stone]]'' by [[:en:Riichiro Inagaki|Riichiro Inagaki]] and [[:en:Boichi|Boichi]] (2018) *''[[:en:Kiyo in Kyoto|Maiko-san chi no Makanai-san]]'' by Aiko Koyama (2019)
| group6 = 2020s | list6 = *''[[Teasing Master Takagi-san]]'' by [[Sōichirō Yamamoto]] and ''[[:en:Chainsaw Man|Chainsaw Man]]'' by [[Tatsuki Fujimoto]] (2020) *''[[:en:Komi Can't Communicate|Komi Can't Communicate]]'' by Tomohito Oda (2021) *''[[:en:Call of the Night|Call of the Night]]'' by Kotoyama and ''[[:en:Ao no Orchestra|Ao no Orchestra]]'' by Makoto Akui (2022)
| below = {{hlist|Categories (until 2022):|[[:en:Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - General|General]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōnen|Shōnen]]|[[:en:Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōjo|Shōjo]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Children|Children]]}}{{hlist|[[:en:Template:Shogakukan Manga Award|2023–]]}} }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}

{{Navbox | name = Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōnen | title = [[Shogakukan Manga Award]] – [[Shōnen manga|Shōnen]] | state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} | listclass = hlist
| group1 = 1970s | list1 = *''[[The Poe Clan]]'' and ''[[They Were Eleven]]'' by [[:en:Moto Hagio|Moto Hagio]] (1975) *''[[:en:Captain (manga)|Captain]]'' and ''[[:en:Play Ball (manga)|Play Ball]]'' by [[:en:Akio Chiba|Akio Chiba]] and ''[[:en:Ganbare Genki|Ganbare Genki]]'' by [[Yū Koyama]] (1976) *''[[:en:Galaxy Express 999|Galaxy Express 999]]'' and ''[[The Cockpit (OVA)|Senjo Manga series]]'' by [[:en:Leiji Matsumoto|Leiji Matsumoto]] (1977) *''[[:en:Dame Oyaji|Dame Oyaji]]'' by [[:en:Mitsutoshi Furuya|Mitsutoshi Furuya]] (1978) *''[[Toward the Terra]]'' and ''[[:en:Kaze to Ki no Uta|Kaze to Ki no Uta]]'' by [[:en:Keiko Takemiya|Keiko Takemiya]] (1979)
| group2 = 1980s | list2 = *''[[:en:Urusei Yatsura|Urusei Yatsura]]'' by [[:en:Rumiko Takahashi|Rumiko Takahashi]] (1980) *''[[:en:Dr. Slump|Dr. Slump]]'' by [[:en:Akira Toriyama|Akira Toriyama]] (1981) *''[[:en:Miyuki (manga)|Miyuki]]'' and ''[[Touch (manga)|Touch]]'' by [[:en:Mitsuru Adachi|Mitsuru Adachi]] (1982) *''[[:en:Musashi no Ken|Musashi no Ken]]'' by [[:en:Motoka Murakami|Motoka Murakami]] (1983) *''[[:en:Futari Daka|Futari Daka]]'' and ''[[:en:Area 88|Area 88]]'' by [[:en:Kaoru Shintani|Kaoru Shintani]] (1984) *''[[:en:Hatsukoi Scandal|Hatsukoi Scandal]]'' and ''[[Tobe! Jinrui II]]'' by [[:en:Akira Oze|Akira Oze]] (1985) *''[[Silver Fang]]'' by [[:en:Yoshihiro Takahashi|Yoshihiro Takahashi]] (1986) *''[[Just Meet]]'' and ''[[Fuyu Monogatari]]'' by [[:en:Hidenori Hara|Hidenori Hara]] (1987) *''[[:en:B.B. (manga)|B.B.]]'' by [[:en:Osamu Ishiwata|Osamu Ishiwata]] (1988) *''[[Ucchare Goshogawara]]'' by [[Tsuyoshi Nakaima]] (1989)
| group3 = 1990s | list3 = *''[[:en:Patlabor|Mobile Police Patlabor]]'' by [[:en:Masami Yuki|Masami Yuki]] (1990) *''[[:en:Ushio & Tora|Ushio & Tora]]'' by [[:en:Kazuhiro Fujita|Kazuhiro Fujita]] (1991) *''[[:en:Ghost Sweeper Mikami|Ghost Sweeper Mikami]]'' by [[:en:Takashi Shiina|Takashi Shiina]] and ''[[:en:Yaiba|Yaiba]]'' by [[:en:Gosho Aoyama|Gosho Aoyama]] (1992) *''[[:en:YuYu Hakusho|YuYu Hakusho]]'' by [[:en:Yoshihiro Togashi|Yoshihiro Togashi]] (1993) *''[[Slam Dunk (manga)|Slam Dunk]]'' by [[:en:Takehiko Inoue|Takehiko Inoue]] (1994) *''[[:en:Major (manga)|Major]]'' by [[:en:Takuya Mitsuda|Takuya Mitsuda]] (1995) *''[[:en:Firefighter! Daigo of Fire Company M|Firefighter! Daigo of Fire Company M]]'' by [[:en:Masahito Soda|Masahito Soda]] (1996) *''[[:en:Ganba! Fly High|Ganba! Fly High]]'' by [[Shinji Morisue]] and [[Hiroyuki Kikuta]] (1997) *''[[:en:Project ARMS|Project ARMS]]'' by [[Kyoichi Nanatsuki]] and [[:en:Ryōji Minagawa|Ryōji Minagawa]] (1998) *''[[:en:Monkey Turn|Monkey Turn]]'' by [[Katsutoshi Kawai]] and ''[[:en:Hikaru no Go|Hikaru no Go]]'' by [[Yumi Hotta]] and [[:en:Takeshi Obata|Takeshi Obata]] (1999)
| group4 = 2000s | list4 = *''[[:en:Case Closed|Case Closed]]'' by [[:en:Gosho Aoyama|Gosho Aoyama]] and ''[[:en:Cheeky Angel|Cheeky Angel]]'' by [[:en:Hiroyuki Nishimori|Hiroyuki Nishimori]] (2000) *''[[:en:Inuyasha|Inuyasha]]'' by [[:en:Rumiko Takahashi|Rumiko Takahashi]] (2001) *''[[:en:Zatch Bell!|Zatch Bell!]]'' by [[:en:Makoto Raiku|Makoto Raiku]] (2002) *''[[:en:Yakitate!! Japan|Yakitate!! Japan]]'' by [[:en:Takashi Hashiguchi|Takashi Hashiguchi]] and ''[[:en:Fullmetal Alchemist|Fullmetal Alchemist]]'' by [[:en:Hiromu Arakawa|Hiromu Arakawa]] (2003) *''[[:en:Bleach (manga)|Bleach]]'' by [[Tite Kubo]] (2004) *''[[:en:Wild Life (manga)|Wild Life]]'' by [[Masato Fujisaki]] (2005) *''[[:en:Kekkaishi|Kekkaishi]]'' by [[:en:Yellow Tanabe|Yellow Tanabe]] (2006) *''[[:en:Ace of Diamond|Ace of Diamond]]'' by [[Yuji Terajima]] (2007) *''[[:en:Cross Game|Cross Game]]'' by [[:en:Mitsuru Adachi|Mitsuru Adachi]] (2008) *''[[Sket Dance]]'' by [[:en:Kenta Shinohara|Kenta Shinohara]] (2009)
| group5 = 2010s | list5 = *''[[:en:King Golf|King Golf]]'' by [[Ken Sasaki]] (2010) *''[[:en:Nobunaga Concerto|Nobunaga Concerto]]'' by [[Ayumi Ishii]] (2011) *''[[Silver Spoon (manga)|Silver Spoon]]'' by [[:en:Hiromu Arakawa|Hiromu Arakawa]] (2012) *''[[:en:Magi: The Labyrinth of Magic|Magi: The Labyrinth of Magic]]'' by [[Shinobu Ohtaka]] (2013) *''[[:en:Be Blues!|Be Blues! - Ao ni Nare]]'' by [[Motoyuki Tanaka]] (2014) *''[[:en:Haikyu!!|Haikyu!!]]'' by [[:en:Haruichi Furudate|Haruichi Furudate]] (2015) *''[[:en:Mob Psycho 100|Mob Psycho 100]]'' by [[:en:One (manga artist)|One]] (2016) *''[[The Promised Neverland]]'' by [[:en:Kaiu Shirai|Kaiu Shirai]] and [[:en:Posuka Demizu|Posuka Demizu]] (2017) *''[[:en:Dr. Stone|Dr. Stone]]'' by [[:en:Riichiro Inagaki|Riichiro Inagaki]] and [[:en:Boichi|Boichi]] (2018) *''[[:en:Kiyo in Kyoto|Maiko-san chi no Makanai-san]]'' by Aiko Koyama (2019)
| group6 = 2020s | list6 = *''[[:en:Teasing Master Takagi-san|Teasing Master Takagi-san]]'' by [[Sōichirō Yamamoto]] and ''[[:en:Chainsaw Man|Chainsaw Man]]'' by [[:en:Tatsuki Fujimoto|Tatsuki Fujimoto]] (2020) *''[[:en:Komi Can't Communicate|Komi Can't Communicate]]'' by Tomohito Oda (2021) *''[[:en:Call of the Night|Call of the Night]]'' by Kotoyama and ''[[:en:Ao no Orchestra|Ao no Orchestra]]'' by Makoto Akui (2022)
| below = {{hlist|Categories (until 2022):|[[:en:Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - General|General]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōnen|Shōnen]]|[[:en:Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Shōjo|Shōjo]]|[[Template:Shogakukan Manga Award - Children|Children]]}}{{hlist|[[:en:Template:Shogakukan Manga Award|2023–]]}} }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
